image.alt: Painted portrait of a dark-haired man with sideburns and a moustache in an ornate red-and-gold military coat with heavy gold epaulettes

attribution.fileTitle: File:Simón Bolívar by José Gil de Castro.jpg
attribution.author: José Gil de Castro

rounds.revealFact: Simón Bolívar led the campaigns that freed six present-day nations from Spanish rule, earning the title 'El Libertador.'

image.alt: Painted folding screen crowded with thousands of samurai, banners, and cavalry spread across a green valley

attribution.author: Sekigahara Town Archive of History and Cultural Anthropology

clues: Two great coalitions of warlords met in a fog-bound mountain valley to settle who would rule the whole country.
The tide turned when one lord switched sides in the middle of the fighting, dooming his former allies.

pairs.b: William Harvey describes how blood circulates through the body

pairs.a: John Snow traces a cholera outbreak to a single London water pump
pairs.b: Gregor Mendel works out the basic laws of heredity

pairs.a: Wilhelm Röntgen produces the first X-ray images
pairs.b: Andreas Vesalius publishes his detailed maps of human anatomy

pairs.a: Karl Landsteiner identifies the human blood groups
pairs.b: The first successful human heart transplant is performed

pairs.a: Frederick Banting and Charles Best isolate insulin
pairs.b: Edward Jenner introduces the smallpox vaccine

image.alt: Color photo of three heavy-coated statesmen seated side by side outdoors, with uniformed officers standing behind them

followUpQuestion.prompt: In what year did the three leaders meet here?

rounds.prompt: The Taj Mahal is completed as a marble tomb for a Mughal emperor's beloved wife.
rounds.revealFact: Shah Jahan raised the Taj Mahal over roughly two decades as a mausoleum for his wife Mumtaz Mahal; it is now among the most visited monuments on earth.

rounds.prompt: Where did an ancient city grow up around a giant marble temple to a goddess, counted among the seven wonders of the ancient world?
rounds.revealFact: Ephesus was one of the greatest cities of the ancient Mediterranean, and its Temple of Artemis was famed as one of the Seven Wonders of the World.
